evals.expected_behavior: Should scan project for .codegraph/, .code-review-graph/, docs/README.md, .comet/, .openspec/, show detection results table, confirm with user, then execute missing init steps in order: codegraph index, code-review-graph init+build, update-project-docs bootstrap, comet init.

Should detect ALL tools uninitialized, show full execution list, confirm with user, run all 4 essential init steps (codegraph, code-review-graph, update-project-docs, comet), ask about openspec as optional, output completion report.
Should detect most tools already initialized (codegraph, code-review-graph, comet, docs), show skip list, only execute truly missing items. Should NOT re-run already initialized tools.

evals.prompt: init project for my new STM32 firmware repo at D:\work\stm32-sensor-hub
evals.expected_behavior: Should trigger project-init skill, scan the STM32 project structure, detect missing tools, and initialize them. update-project-docs bootstrap should detect STM32 HAL/LL library and generate appropriate CLAUDE.md.
